task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Santiago_UChile' ground station with correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog in GPredict showing Name: 'Santiago_UChile', Latitude: 33.4500 S (or -33.45), Longitude: 70.6600 W (or -70.66), and Altitude: 520.

task_completion.description: Verify the horizon mask file is loaded for the ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ground station configuration dialog, check if the 'Horizon file' or 'Horizon' field points to the exact path '/home/ga/Documents/andes_mask.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Andes_EO' module bound to the 'Santiago_UChile' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New module' or 'Module properties' dialog showing the module name as 'Andes_EO' and the selected ground station (QTH) dropdown set to 'Santiago_UChile'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct satellites are added to the 'Andes_EO' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the module configuration dialog, the list of 'Selected Satellites' must include SUOMI NPP (37849), FENGYUN 3A (32958), and FENGYUN 3B (37214).

task_completion.description: Verify the map settings are configured to display exactly 4 orbits for the ground track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the module's map configuration or properties dialog (often under 'Map' or 'Ground Track' settings) showing the 'Number of orbits' or 'Ground track' value set to 4.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings rather than editing configuration files directly via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict dialog boxes being actively used. There should be no terminal windows open editing .config/Gpredict/ files with text editors like nano or vim.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict main window and its standard UI elements (maps, satellite lists, menus) should be visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just write a text file with the expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration must be within the GPredict application's specific input fields, not typed out in a generic text editor or terminal echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Ground Station Name: 'Santiago_UChile'. Coordinates: Latitude 33.45 S (or -33.45), Longitude 70.66 W (or -70.66), Altitude 520m. Horizon mask file path: '/home/ga/Documents/andes_mask.txt'. Target Module Name: 'Andes_EO'. Required Satellites: SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), FENGYUN 3A (NORAD 32958), and FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214). Expected ground track orbits: 4.
